title: Wild Grass
description: All the grass related blocks will be better. Looks like overgrown.
body:
This resource pack retexture grass to better look. Not only the grass block it is also same for podzol,mycelium,dirt path,Crimson nyleium,warped nyleium. It makes them all looks more wild,overgrown aand better.

  ――――――――――――――Loved the texture pack? Check out more [here](https://modrinth.com/user/Orenxo)――――――――――――――

➙Join our discord server for fun community and get updates.
